code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0

while i <= n
  mut is_end = false
  if i == n
    is_end = true
  end
  mut is_ws = false
  if is_end
    is_ws = true
  else
    let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
      is_ws = true
    end
  end
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if v > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    let b2 = match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b2)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("positive=#{count}")
